dialogues.title: Completion
dialogues.message: Congratulations! You have completed the level

dialogues.title: Story
dialogues.message: Special Agent Nut enters the scene once again.

dialogues.title: Story
dialogues.message: As he nears his place of residence, he notices a snowflake land on his nose.

dialogues.title: Story
dialogues.message: Winter seems to be aproaching quicker this year.

dialogues.title: Story
dialogues.message: He must hurry in order to make it back safe and sound.

dialogues.title: Story
dialogues.message: Will Agent Nut succeed in this mission?

dialogues.title: Story
dialogues.message: Or will he succumb to the elements?
